title: Kosullar (if/switch)
subtitle: Kosullu ifadeler ve karsilastirma operatorleri.
code:
<?php

$score = 78;

if ($score >= 90) {
    $grade = "AA";
} elseif ($score >= 70) {
    $grade = "BA";
} elseif ($score >= 50) {
    $grade = "CC";
} else {
    $grade = "FF";
}

echo "Not: " . $score . " -> Harf notu: " . $grade . "\n";

// Switch ornegi
$day = 3;

switch ($day) {
    case 1:
        $dayName = "Pazartesi";
        break;
    case 2:
        $dayName = "Sali";
        break;
    case 3:
        $dayName = "Carsamba";
        break;
    default:
        $dayName = "Bilinmeyen gun";
        break;
}

echo "Gun: " . $dayName . "\n";

// Ternary operator
$number = 7;
$parity = ($number % 2 == 0) ? "Cift" : "Tek";
echo "\n" . $number . " sayisi " . $parity . "\n";

// match ifadesi (PHP 8+)
$grade2 = match (true) {
    $score >= 90 => "AA",
    $score >= 70 => "BA",
    $score >= 50 => "CC",
    default => "FF",
};
echo "\nmatch ile not: " . $grade2 . "\n";

?>
